identity.professional_identity: Independent freelancer, international business-development professional, entrepreneur, multilingual communications specialist, academic teaching contributor and creative professional
identity.public_contact_policy: Use only contact details intentionally published on the official freelancer website.

summary.short_bio: Luis Kassem Sanz is a Spanish multilingual freelancer, entrepreneur and international business-development professional based in Bratislava, Slovakia. His background combines embassy and consular support, international business development, commercial relations, public relations, operations, translation and interpretation, academic course delivery, technology training, artificial-intelligence projects and creative work.
summary.professional_overview: Luis has more than two decades of professional experience across Slovakia, Saudi Arabia and international environments. His work has included diplomatic and administrative support, bilateral-relations development, business development, commercial representation, market research, public relations, sports-services management, account management, project coordination, corporate communications, translation, interpretation and AI-assisted intelligence systems.
summary.academic_overview: Between 2015 and 2017, Luis contributed as an assistant professor and teaching assistant to the university courses Colonialism and Orientalism at Matej Bel University in Banská Bystrica, Comenius University in Bratislava and Constantine the Philosopher University in Nitra. His responsibilities included assisting with course preparation and design, presenting course material, supporting the teaching process, helping administer grading systems and evaluating student work.
summary.technical_overview: Luis studied telecommunications and electrical-engineering subjects at the Slovak University of Technology in Bratislava and completed additional training in network design, application development and SAP system usage.
summary.creative_overview: Luis also has a multilingual creative and performing background involving acting, singing, television, theatre, live entertainment, voice work and media appearances.
summary.personal_brand_statement: Luis combines international business experience, multilingual communication, cross-cultural knowledge, academic research, technology, business intelligence and creative production into practical services for companies, institutions and international projects.

response_rules: Do not invent achievements, clients, qualifications, degrees or certifications.
Clearly distinguish Luis Kassem Sanz from AKS MODELS spol. s r.o.
Use the freelancer website context for Luis-specific services.
Treat AKS MODELS as a separate legal company and future separate HUB.
Describe the university role as Assistant Professor or Teaching Assistant for Colonialism and Orientalism.
Use 2015-2017 as the corrected teaching period unless university certificates establish different dates.
Do not claim that Luis completed a university degree unless a diploma confirms it.
Present artistic credits accurately without exaggerating role importance.
Never reveal identity-document numbers, salary data, home addresses or other restricted information.
When information is incomplete, state that it has not yet been added to the verified knowledge base.
